auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Kustomer API key sent as a Bearer token. Use a Kustomer API token with permissions for the customer endpoints; see the API introduction: https://help.kustomer.com/api-introduction-BkwVN42zM.

actions.name: create_customer

anyOf.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API customer resource object, including type, id, attributes, relationships, and links when returned.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API customer resource object, including type, id, attributes, relationships, and links when returned.

anyOf.description: The Kustomer customer resources returned by a multi-ID lookup.

data.description: The Kustomer customer resource or resources returned by the endpoint.

meta.description: Kustomer response metadata such as pagination totals.

links.description: Kustomer JSON:API links returned with the response.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API included resource object, such as an included company.

included.description: Kustomer JSON:API included resources returned when include parameters are used.

outputSchema.description: A Kustomer response containing one customer resource.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve one Kustomer customer by customer ID.

id.description: Kustomer customer ID. A comma-separated list can retrieve multiple customers.

include.description: Comma-separated includes. Kustomer documents company as the supported include for customer lookup endpoints.

inputSchema.description: Parameters for retrieving a Kustomer customer by ID.

links.description: Kustomer JSON:API links returned with the response.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API included resource object, such as an included company.

included.description: Kustomer JSON:API included resources returned when include parameters are used.

outputSchema.description: A Kustomer response containing one customer resource.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List Kustomer customers with pagination, sorting, and createdAt or updatedAt timestamp filters.

gt.description: Return customers with a timestamp greater than this ISO 8601 value.

gte.description: Return customers with a timestamp greater than or equal to this ISO 8601 value.

lt.description: Return customers with a timestamp less than this ISO 8601 value.

lte.description: Return customers with a timestamp less than or equal to this ISO 8601 value.

gt.description: Return customers with a timestamp greater than this ISO 8601 value.

gte.description: Return customers with a timestamp greater than or equal to this ISO 8601 value.

lt.description: Return customers with a timestamp less than this ISO 8601 value.

lte.description: Return customers with a timestamp less than or equal to this ISO 8601 value.

updatedAt.description: Filter customers by last update timestamp.

filter.description: Kustomer customer list filters for createdAt and updatedAt timestamp ranges.

sort.description: Sort customers by createdAt or updatedAt, with '-' for descending order.

page.description: Page number of customer results to return.

pageSize.description: Number of customer results to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Pagination, sorting, and timestamp filters for listing Kustomer customers.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API customer resource object, including type, id, attributes, relationships, and links when returned.

data.description: The Kustomer customer resources returned on this page.

meta.description: Kustomer response metadata such as pagination totals.

links.description: Kustomer JSON:API links returned with the response.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API included resource object, such as an included company.

included.description: Kustomer JSON:API included resources returned when include parameters are used.

outputSchema.description: A Kustomer response containing a page of customer resources.

actions.name: search_customers
actions.description: Search Kustomer customers with Kustomer's JSON search criteria DSL.

query.description: Kustomer customer search criteria JSON body.

page.description: Page number of search results to return.

pageSize.description: Number of search results to return per page.

id.description: Saved search ID used to execute a stored query before searching.

withIntelliAggs.description: Include intelligent aggregation data in search results.

trackTotalHits.description: Track an exact total hit count for the search request.

anyOf.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API customer resource object, including type, id, attributes, relationships, and links when returned.
Customer ID returned when idsOnly is true.

items.description: One Kustomer customer search result.

data.description: The Kustomer customer resources returned on this page, or customer IDs when idsOnly is true.

meta.description: Kustomer response metadata such as pagination totals.

links.description: Kustomer JSON:API links returned with the response.

items.description: A raw Kustomer JSON:API included resource object, such as an included company.

included.description: Kustomer JSON:API included resources returned when include parameters are used.

outputSchema.description: A Kustomer response containing customer search results.
